name: Isbir Holding A.S.
summary: Isbir Holding A.S., together with its subsidiaries, produces, markets, and sells home furnishing products. It provides spring and foam mattresses, as well as polyurethane foam products, and mesh and big bags. The company is also involved in the insurance brokerage and investment businesses. Isbir Holding A.S. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.
